title: Scale all service Deployments to 2 replicas and create HPAs for 5 services
subtasks: Update all service Deployment manifests to set replicas: 2 (except Morgan, which remains at 1).

Create HorizontalPodAutoscaler manifests for equipment-catalog (min=2, max=8, CPU=70%), rms (min=2, max=6, CPU=70%), finance (min=2, max=4, CPU=70%), customer-vetting (min=2, max=4, CPU=70%), and social-engine (min=2, max=4, CPU=70%).
Apply updated Deployments and HPAs using helm upgrade.
Verify all pods are running with READY=2/2 (or 1/1 for Morgan) and HPAs are present with correct min/max settings.

title: Scale CNPG PostgreSQL cluster to 2 instances with WAL archival to R2
subtasks: Edit the CloudNativePG Cluster CR to set spec.instances: 2.
Enable WAL archival to the sigma1-wal-archive R2 bucket using barmanObjectStore configuration.
Apply the updated Cluster CR and verify both instances are Ready.
Check streaming replication status and confirm WAL files are being archived to R2.

title: Scale Valkey to 2 replicas
subtasks: Update the Valkey Deployment or StatefulSet to replicas: 2.
If supported, configure Valkey replication (primary/replica); otherwise, run 2 independent instances.
Update the infra-endpoints ConfigMap if necessary to point to the primary.
Apply and verify both Valkey pods are Running and replication is healthy if configured.

title: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy for equipment-catalog service
subtasks: Create a CiliumNetworkPolicy for equipment-catalog allowing ingress only from morgan, blaze-website, and mobile-app pods.
Allow egress only to postgres, valkey, and the R2 endpoint FQDN.
Deny all other traffic by default.
Apply and verify policy enforcement with test pod-to-pod connectivity.

title: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy for RMS service
subtasks: Create a CiliumNetworkPolicy for RMS allowing ingress only from morgan and equipment-catalog pods.
Allow egress only to postgres, valkey, and Google Calendar API FQDNs.
Deny all other traffic by default.
Apply and verify policy enforcement.

title: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy for finance service
subtasks: Create a CiliumNetworkPolicy for finance allowing ingress only from morgan and rms pods.
Allow egress only to postgres, valkey, and Stripe API FQDN.
Deny all other traffic by default.
Apply and verify policy enforcement.

title: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy for customer-vetting service
subtasks: Create a CiliumNetworkPolicy for customer-vetting allowing ingress only from morgan and rms.
Allow egress only to postgres, valkey, and the FQDNs for OpenCorporates, LinkedIn, and Google APIs.
Deny all other traffic by default.
Apply and verify policy enforcement.

title: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy for social-engine service
subtasks: Create a CiliumNetworkPolicy for social-engine allowing ingress only from morgan.
Allow egress to postgres, valkey, R2 endpoint, and the FQDNs for Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Facebook, and OpenAI APIs.
Deny all other traffic by default.
Apply and verify policy enforcement.

title: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy for Morgan service
subtasks: Create a CiliumNetworkPolicy for Morgan allowing ingress from cloudflared pods and web clients via the tunnel.
Allow egress to all 5 backend services, signal-cli pod, and the FQDNs for ElevenLabs and Twilio.
Deny ingress from arbitrary internet IPs (only allow via cloudflared).
Apply and verify policy enforcement.

title: Deploy cloudflared Cloudflare Tunnel and configure ingress routing
subtasks: Deploy a cloudflared Deployment (1 replica) in the sigma1 namespace.
Configure the tunnel to expose morgan-chat-svc:3000 as chat.sigma1.com and signal webhook as signals.sigma1.com.
Store tunnel credentials as a Kubernetes Secret.
Enforce HTTPS-only at the Cloudflare dashboard.
Ensure all services use ClusterIP only (no NodePort/LoadBalancer).
Test external access to chat and signal endpoints via Cloudflare Tunnel.

title: Implement per-service RBAC: ServiceAccounts, Roles, and automountServiceAccountToken disabled
subtasks: Create a dedicated ServiceAccount for each service Deployment.
Create a Role per service with least-privilege rules (read only their own secrets).
Set automountServiceAccountToken: false on all non-ArgoCD pods.
Update each Deployment to use its ServiceAccount.
Verify no pod has default SA token mounted and RoleBindings are correct.

title: Create secret rotation CronJob and ops runbook
subtasks: Create a Kubernetes CronJob named secret-rotation-reminder that runs monthly and logs a rotation reminder for all sensitive secrets.
Write the rotation runbook at ops/runbooks/secret-rotation.md with step-by-step instructions for secret rotation and deployment restart.
Test CronJob execution and verify log output is captured by Loki.

title: Create ArgoCD Application CRs for all services with automated sync and rollback alerting
subtasks: Create an ArgoCD Application CR for each service (equipment-catalog, rms, finance, customer-vetting, social-engine, morgan) with automated sync, selfHeal, and prune enabled.
Configure a Loki alert rule to fire when any Application has 3+ consecutive sync failures.
Apply and verify all Applications are Synced and Healthy in ArgoCD UI.
Test rollback alerting by simulating sync failures.

title: Create GitHub Actions pr-review.yml workflow with Stitch code review integration
subtasks: Create .github/workflows/pr-review.yml to trigger on pull_request events.
Integrate Stitch code review by calling the Stitch API with PR details and changed files.
Post the Stitch review as a PR comment.
Store STITCH_API_TOKEN as a GitHub Actions secret.
Test by opening a PR and verifying the Stitch review comment appears.

title: Create GitHub Actions quality.yml workflow with Cleo linting for all language stacks
subtasks: Create .github/workflows/quality.yml to trigger on pull_request.
Run Cleo-driven linting: clippy + rustfmt for Rust, eslint + biome.js for Node/TypeScript, go vet + golangci-lint for Go.
Fail the workflow if any linter reports errors.
Test by pushing a PR with a known lint error and verify the workflow fails.
